items.author: @SakanaAILabs
items.text: DiffusionBlocks: Training Neural Networks One Block at a Time https://pub.sakana.ai/diffusionblocks/ tl;dr We introduce DiffusionBlocks, a principled framework that partitions a residual network into blocks and trains each one independently by reinterpreting block-wise updates as the reverse process of a diffusion mode

items.author: @johnschulman2
items.text: Glad to see this -- renderers are a foundational component of the LLM stack. Renderers map between tokens and messages, which are invariant to tokenizer and formatting details. Most APIs, datasets, and RL environments are defined in terms of messages. Getting the details wrong leads to train-test mismatches, caching in

items.author: @alexalbert__
items.text: Fast mode for Opus 4.8 is much more affordable now. Try it out in Claude Code, I've found it changes how I use Claude. Fast mode for interactive work where I want rapid responses, normal mode for longer async tasks where I don't need results right away.

items.summary: Fast mode for Opus 4.8 is much more affordable now. Try it out in Claude Code, I've found it changes how I use Claude. Fast mode for interactive work where I want rapid responses, normal mode for longer async tasks where I don't need results right away.

roundup.title: Agent SDKs, Local Runtimes & 1M-Context Models Lead
roundup.subtitle: Copilot SDK GA、MiniMax M3 与 NVIDIA OpenShell 集中发布
headline: @github 宣布 GitHub Copilot SDK 正式 GA，开发者可将 agentic engine 直接嵌入自有应用与服务；@cursor_ai 同期强调云端 Agent 需要 durable execution、harness 与完整 infra 支持，凸显工具链成熟。
@MiniMax_AI 发布 M3 模型，采用 MSA 稀疏注意力实现 1M context 并在 SWE-Bench Pro 超越 GPT-5.5 与 Gemini 3.1 Pro；@OpenRouter 同步上线 MAI-Transcribe-1.5，43 语言语音转写速度与精度双双登顶。
@nvidia 与 @Microsoft 联合推出 OpenShell runtime，支持 Windows 本地 Agent 的安全治理与本地-云端智能路由；@perplexity_ai 同时宣布 Perplexity Computer 混合 agentic inference，任务可在本地与云端模型间拆分。
@LangChain 推出 LangSmith Sandboxes GA 及 Deep Agents Rubrics 功能，支持快照、并行分支与自纠错 grader；@weaviate_io 强调 RAG Agent 成功关键在于 Security、Retrieval、Instructions 四层系统设计而非单一模型。
@AnthropicAI 向 SEC 提交机密 S-1 文件并完成 650 亿美元 Series H 融资，估值达 9650 亿美元；行业从模型竞赛转向 agent 生产级落地与资本退出信号同步显现。

deepDives.title: MiniMax M3 正式发布
deepDives.summary: MiniMax 推出原生多模态 M3 模型，采用 MSA 注意力架构，在 1M 上下文下保持高性能并在编码基准领先。

facts.text: M3 支持 1M context window、原生多模态与自评估视觉-编码任务。
facts.quote: Coding like Opus4.7 / 1M context window / Native multimodal... beats GPT-5.5 and Gemini 3.1 Pro on SWE-Bench Pro

facts.text: MSA 稀疏注意力使 1M 上下文保持可处理状态。
facts.quote: MSA (MiniMax Sparse Attention) is the star... 1M context window stays tractable

bullish.text: 新注意力架构匹配全注意力同时大幅降低计算

deepDives.title: GitHub Copilot SDK 正式 GA
deepDives.summary: GitHub 发布稳定版 Copilot SDK，允许将 agentic engine 嵌入第三方应用与开发者工具。

facts.text: Copilot SDK 提供稳定 API 与生产级支持。
facts.quote: Embed Copilot's agentic engine into your own applications, services, and developer tools with a stable API and production-ready support

bullish.text: 终于能把 agentic 能力直接塞进自有产品了

bullets.text: LangSmith Sandboxes 支持快照与廉价并行分支。
bullets.quote: Capture a running sandbox. Spin up 10 parallel branches for roughly the cost of one.

bullets.text: NVIDIA OpenShell runtime 提供本地 Agent 治理与策略执行。
bullets.quote: NVIDIA OpenShell runtime for agents will provide governance tools, policy enforcement, and smart local-to-cloud query routing

bullets.text: Deep Agents 新增 RubricMiddleware，支持 grader 子代理自纠错。
bullets.quote: Attach a rubric to your agent invocation, and a grader evaluates and self-corrects output until it satisfies all requirements

bullets.text: Perplexity Computer 实现本地与云端混合 agentic inference。
bullets.quote: Computer can split tasks between a local model running on your machine and frontier models in the cloud

bullets.text: MAI-Transcribe-1.5 在 FLEURS 43 语言平均准确率与速度 Pareto Frontier 排名第一。
bullets.quote: #1 on FLEURS averaged across 43 languages #1 on @ArtificialAnlys Accuracy x Speed Pareto Frontier

topTweets.author: @LangChain
topTweets.text: LangSmith Sandboxes GA：快照与廉价并行分支
topTweets.whyItMatters: Agent 调试与并行实验成本大幅降低

takeaways: Agent 开发重点已从模型转向 durable execution、harness 与安全 runtime。
1M 上下文 + 稀疏注意力成为新模型标配，需关注 MSA 类架构对 evals 的影响。
本地-云端混合推理与 OpenShell 式治理工具正成为生产 Agent 的标配选项。
SDK GA 与沙箱并行分支功能显著降低团队构建复杂 Agent 的门槛。
